rationale: Non-equivalence (not-equiv) is the negation of def:log-equiv, missing here. Same negative-result shape as 0035.
notes: Counterexample structure not statement-licensed -> flagged not added. Edge to thm:qcomm (same-type commutation) is the contrast pairing. Note this is the not-equiv twin of 0026 (which states the same fact as a not-models non-entailment); the two should be treated alike.
